title: Did This Woman Buy a Renoir Drawing Worth Millions For $12?
transcript:
She may have made the deal of the century without knowing it.
My eyes just went to that and...
I didn't touch it though. I didn't turn it around. I didn't really inspect it.
I just knew that I wanted it.
Heidi Markow saw the drawing at an auction outside Philadelphia.
What was the winning bid? A grand total of $12.
Yep, 12 bucks.
Brace yourselves. Experts say it may be worth at least a million dollars.
Today, this drawing is the talk of the art world.
Because it's believed to be the work of the famous French impressionist Renoir from the early 1900s.
I absolutely 100% did not think that I would be bringing home a Renoir.
Heidi only realized it could be a Renoir when she took a close look at the drawing,
and made out a faint signature.
Look, it says Renoir.
From 12 bucks to a million dollars.
Now that's a pretty good markup.
You feel really blessed when...
you find a piece for $100 and you can sell it for 5000, you know.
But this here, yeah, this is pretty spectacular.
Heidi says she's having the artwork officially appraised by a Renoir expert next month.
And by the way, the most a Renoir painting has sold for at auction is 78.1 million dollars.
